title: Xtra Spicy British Beef Casserole
description: A spicy and aerated British dish featuring red wine and spherified elements, perfect for a low-calorie dinner
instructions: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees Celsius
In a large bowl, mix together the beef strips, spicy tomato sauce, and olive oil
In a separate bowl, mix together the sodium alginate and water to create a spherification bath
Add the sliced mushrooms and chopped onions to the beef mixture and stir well
Using a syringe, drop small amounts of the beef mixture into the spherification bath to create spherified elements
In a large casserole dish, arrange a layer of the spherified beef elements
Add a layer of the spicy tomato sauce on top of the beef layer
Repeat steps 6 and 7 until all ingredients are used, finishing with a layer of sauce on top
Season with salt and black pepper to taste
Bake in the preheated oven for 30 minutes
Remove from the oven and let rest for 10 minutes before serving
